text:
Marketing 101: I've had this awesome "features vs benefits" pix from 
@UserOnboard
 pinned since 2017.

Here's my additional 2cents:

Google's iOS apps release cycle before & after Apple asks to disclose privacy labels.

Thie pattern is probably just a coincidence. We all know "transparency forms the bedrock of [their] commitment to users"...

Google under 
@sundarpichai
: 
an army of Nelson Bighettis

In the own words of an 18-years Googler:

"Google's culture eroded. Decisions went from being made for the benefit of users, to the benefit of Google, to the benefit of whoever was making the decision. Transparency
